info.title: Harness daemon API
info.description: REST API served by the Harness daemon (harness-daemon). The API is dual-transport: most endpoints mirror a WebSocket JSON-RPC method, recorded per operation as the `x-websocket-method` extension. Generated from annotated handlers - do not edit docs/api/openapi.json by hand; regenerate with `mise run openapi:generate`.

409.description: A session already exists for the adopted directory; body is `{"error": "already-attached", "session_id": ...}`

422.description: Adoption request could not be validated; body `error` is one of `layout-violation`, `unsupported-schema-version`, or `origin-mismatch`, each with its own context fields

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Set to `core` for the reduced core view; any other value or omission returns the full detail

404.description: Session not found; body is `{"error": "session not found"}`

requestBody.description: Optional observe options; the body may be omitted

200.description: Review arbitrated to a final verdict
Task dropped from the target's queue
Author response to review points recorded

message.description:
Compatibility summary for clients that still expect a single-line prompt
message.

AgentPersona.description: A predefined agent definition that shapes an agent's role and focus.

description.description: What this persona does, shown in detail views.

AgentStatusSchema.description: Serialized agent status: a bare status string or a disconnected object.

ArbitrationOutcome.description:
Leader arbitration result for a task that exhausted the three-round
review cycle with outstanding disputed points.

AskUserQuestionPrompt.description: An `AskUserQuestion` prompt with header, options, multi-select.

AwaitingReview.description:
Metadata attached when a worker submits a task for review and the task
returns to the queue awaiting a reviewer claim.

queued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task entered the awaiting-review state.

required_consensus.description: Number of distinct-runtime reviewers required to close consensus.

submitter_agent_id.description: Agent id of the worker that submitted for review.

summary.description: Optional summary text the worker attached on submission.

DaemonErrorBody.description:
Error envelope returned by daemon handlers on failure.

Mirrors the dominant shape produced by `error_status_and_body`
(`{"error": {"code", "message", "details"}}`). A few endpoints emit
alternate ad-hoc error shapes for specific conditions; those are noted in
the relevant operation descriptions.

HookIntegrationDescriptor.description: One user-visible hook interception point for signal pickup.

ImproverTarget.description: Canonical writeable targets for improver patches.

IssueCode.description: Stable internal identity for a classified issue family.

IssueSeverity.description: Severity level of an observed issue, ordered for filtering.

ManagedAgentKind.description: Transport family for a daemon-managed agent reference.

PendingLeaderTransfer.description: A pending leadership transfer initiated by a non-leader actor.

oneOf.description: A system SF Symbol identified by name (e.g. `magnifyingglass.circle.fill`).
An image baked into the app's asset catalog.

PersonaSymbol.description: Icon source for a persona, supporting system SF Symbols or bundled assets.

ReadinessResponse.description:
Lightweight readiness probe response.

Returned by `GET /v1/ready`. Confirms the daemon is serving HTTP, the
caller is authenticated, and the backing storage slot is wired up - but
intentionally avoids any database query so short-lived CLI invocations can
verify readiness cheaply.

ReviewClaim.description: Set of reviewers currently holding or having completed a claim on the task.

ReviewConsensus.description:
Aggregated quorum consensus once `required_consensus` distinct-runtime
reviewers have submitted compatible verdicts.

ReviewPoint.description: A single numbered review point the worker may agree to or dispute.

ReviewVerdict.description: Verdict a reviewer chooses on submission.

ReviewerEntry.description: One entry in a task's reviewer claim.

RuntimeCapabilities.description: Serializable runtime capability metadata exposed to daemon clients.

RuntimeSessionResolutionResponse.description:
Wire-level outcome of a runtime-session lookup.

Returned by `GET /v1/runtime-sessions/resolve`. `resolved` is `None` when
no live agent matches; `Some` carries the single unambiguous match. The
daemon surfaces ambiguity as a `session_ambiguous` error instead of
populating this response with multiple entries.

SessionAdHocError.description:
Ad-hoc error body emitted by a few session endpoints that predate the
standard [`DaemonErrorBody`] envelope. It always carries a short string
`error` tag or message; some responses add variant-specific fields, which
the owning operation documents. The schema leaves additional properties
open so those variant fields validate.

error.description:
Error tag or message, for example `already-attached` or
`session not found`.

persona.description: Persona identifier to resolve and attach to the agent registration.

SessionMetrics.description: Lightweight rollup metrics for session summaries.

SessionRole.description: Role an agent holds within a session.

SessionSignalRecord.description: A signal visible within a multi-agent session.

SessionSignalStatus.description: Session-visible signal status for CLI and daemon rendering.

SessionState.description: Main versioned state document for a multi-agent orchestration session.

adopted_at.description: Timestamp when this session was adopted from an external origin.

agents.description: Registered agents keyed by agent ID.

archived_at.description: Timestamp when the session was archived.

branch_ref.description: Git branch owned by this session (`harness/<sid>`).

external_origin.description: Path of the external session directory this session was adopted from.

leader_id.description: Agent ID of the current leader.

metrics.description: Cached counts for fast daemon and UI list rendering.

observe_id.description: Observe state identifier associated with this session.

oneOf.description: Pending leadership transfer request awaiting confirmation.

shared_path.description: Per-session shared directory for cross-agent artefacts.

state_version.description: Monotonically increasing counter for optimistic concurrency.

tasks.description: Work items keyed by task ID.

Signal.description: A signal sent to an agent session.

TaskCheckpointSummary.description: Snapshot of the latest checkpoint for a task.

TaskNote.description: A note attached to a work item status transition.

TaskQueuePolicy.description:
Whether a queued task can move to another free worker before its selected
worker becomes available.

TaskSeverity.description: Severity level for a work item.

TaskSource.description: Source that introduced a work item.

WorkItem.description: A work item tracked within a session.

oneOf.description: Metadata for the awaiting-review queue entry.
Closed quorum consensus, set once `required_consensus` reviewers agree.

deleted_at.description:
Tombstone timestamp for tasks deleted from active session views while
preserving their historical identity and timeline.

oneOf.description: Active reviewer claim, including distinct-runtime reviewer entries.

review_history.description:
Per-round consensus history: each entry is the merged-and-responded
consensus from one completed round, pushed here before
`task.consensus` is cleared so per-point agree/dispute state and
worker notes survive across rounds.

review_round.description: Review round counter; increments each time a reworked task goes back to review.

suggested_persona.description: Persona hint to bias routing when assigning to a worker.

RemoteAuthRequired.description: Missing, invalid, or unauthorized daemon credentials

RemoteRequestUriTooLong.description: Request URI exceeds the configured remote limit

RemoteRequestBodyTooLarge.description: Request body exceeds the configured remote limit

RemoteRequestHeadersTooLarge.description: Request headers exceed the configured remote limit

RemoteRequestThrottled.description: Remote request or connection concurrency limit reached

RemoteServiceUnavailable.description: Remote auth store or request limits unavailable

RemoteRequestTimedOut.description: Remote request exceeded the configured timeout

x-generated-by.note: Generated file. Do not edit by hand - rerun: mise run openapi:generate
